# SYSTEM SELF-HEAL REPORT — 2026-07-02
## HCI AI OS — Post-Incident Analysis + Permanent Fixes
**Generated by:** BC (Browser Claude) | **Triggered by:** Buck Adams
**Date:** 2026-07-02 | **Severity:** MEDIUM (no data loss, no production impact)

---

## WHAT HAPPENED (Root Cause Analysis)

### Incident 1: Code Context Confusion (Sprint 3 vs Sprint 7)

**Symptom:** Code reported 'SPRINT_7_DIRECTIVE.md doesn't exist' and showed Sprint 3
as the active sprint despite BC committing Cycles 27-36 to AI_TEAM/.

**Root Cause:** Code's self-maintained numbered status files (AI_TEAM/00_STATUS.md,
AI_TEAM/02_ACTIVE_WORK.md) were last updated during Sprint 3 and showed
'Sprint 3: Production Stabilization' as the active sprint.
Code reads these files at session start BEFORE scanning for new CYCLE files.
Result: Code thought it was in Sprint 3 even though Sprint 7 specs were present.

**Contributing Factor:** A stale .docx file in Buck's Downloads folder
(/Users/buckadams/Downloads/new code .docx) was read by Code and contained
three restart steps referencing nonexistent files. This compounded the confusion.

**What Did NOT Fail:** GitHub repo, gateway, mission control, all API endpoints.
The specs were all there. Code just had the wrong context file telling it
what sprint it was in.

### Incident 2: GBT Gateway Tool Not Firing

**Symptom:** GBT (HCI Chief Architect GPT) cannot directly call gateway endpoints.
When asked to run a gateway health check, GBT used web search instead of
its configured gateway tools, returning general ngrok docs instead of live data.

**Root Cause:** The ChatGPT custom GPT tool configuration (Actions/API schema)
is either: (a) misconfigured, (b) the ngrok URL changed and the schema wasn't
updated, or (c) the tool auth token expired or was never set in the GPT config.
GBT confirmed: 'I can't directly interrogate your private gateway from this chat
unless I have an authenticated API path I can call.'

**Impact:** GBT has been operating in spec-only mode (no live data access).
All Cycle 27-36 architecture specs were generated without live gateway reads.
Cycles scored 9.7-9.9/10 regardless, but GBT is flying partially blind.

### Incident 3: BC Message Truncation to GBT

**Symptom:** Long multi-line messages typed into GBT's mobile chat field
were truncated — GBT only received the first line.

**Root Cause:** The ChatGPT mobile viewport (469px wide) appears to limit
the amount of text that can be pasted/typed into the input field in one action.
Messages over ~300 chars reliably truncated. Messages under ~200 chars worked.

**Fix Applied:** BC switched to short, focused single-paragraph prompts per cycle.
Cycles 34-37 all received full prompts and generated complete responses.

---

## PERMANENT FIXES APPLIED TODAY

### Fix 1: Sprint State Files Updated
**Action:** BC updated AI_TEAM/00_STATUS.md and AI_TEAM/02_ACTIVE_WORK.md to
reflect Sprint 7 as the active sprint.
**Result:** Code will no longer start a session thinking it's in Sprint 3.
**File:** See 00_STATUS.md and 02_ACTIVE_WORK.md commits today.

### Fix 2: Gateway Handoff Posted
**Action:** BC posted to /gateway/agent/handoff with exact orientation instructions
for Code (Sprint 7 directive, git pull command, implementation order).
**File written:** Architecture/Agent_Handoff/Inbox/GBT_HANDOFF_2026-07-02_SPRINT_7_CONTEXT_CORRECTION.md
**Result:** Code inbox contains the correct orientation. Request ID: 65339ef5

### Fix 3: CODE_SYNC_DIRECTIVE committed to GitHub
**Action:** BC committed AI_TEAM/CODE_SYNC_DIRECTIVE_2026-07-02.md with
full situation report, correct file paths, and git pull command.
**Result:** Even if inbox is empty, Code can read the directive from GitHub.

### Fix 4: BC Message Strategy Changed
**Action:** All GBT prompts now kept under 250 chars per send.
Multi-part specs sent as short focused questions, not full spec dumps.
**Result:** Zero truncation since Cycle 34. GBT receiving full prompts.

## WHAT STILL NEEDS FIXING (Open Items)

### OPEN-001: GBT Gateway Tool Configuration (HIGH)
**Problem:** GBT's custom GPT Actions are not calling the HCI gateway.
GBT is using web search as fallback instead of hitting gateway endpoints.
**Fix Required:** Buck needs to open the HCI Chief Architect GPT configuration
at chatgpt.com and verify/update the Actions schema with:
  - Server URL: https://speculate-armband-retinal.ngrok-free.dev
  - Auth: API Key header X-API-Key = hci-a4fe3f56f42b981e59a98ec112c43ef975ac68c7fc0517c6
  - Verify all GET /gateway/* endpoints are in the schema
**Owner:** Buck (requires GPT editor access)
**Priority:** HIGH — GBT flying blind without live data

### OPEN-002: Sprint Status File Auto-Update Protocol (MEDIUM)
**Problem:** No automated process updates 00_STATUS.md/02_ACTIVE_WORK.md
when BC advances the sprint. Files go stale between BC sessions.
**Fix Required:** BC must update these files at the end of each sprint phase.
Code should ALSO update them when it completes implementation milestones.
**Owner:** BC + Code
**Priority:** MEDIUM

### OPEN-003: Agent Handoff Inbox Path Mismatch (LOW)
**Problem:** Gateway writes handoffs to Architecture/Agent_Handoff/Inbox/
but Code checked a different path and found it empty.
**Fix Required:** Verify the actual local path the gateway writes to and
update CLAUDE.md to point Code to the correct inbox directory.
**Owner:** Code
**Priority:** LOW — workaround (git pull + read directive directly) works fine

### OPEN-004: Telegram Credentials (HIGH — Buck action)
**Problem:** Telegram Phase 1 cannot be tested without bot credentials.
**Fix Required:** Buck provides TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN (from @BotFather) +
TELEGRAM_BUCK_USER_ID (from @userinfobot)
**Owner:** Buck
**Priority:** HIGH for Telegram Phase 1

## SELF-HEAL PROTOCOL (Permanent, recurring)

When any agent (BC, Code, GBT) detects a context mismatch:
1. STOP current task
2. Run: git pull origin main
3. Read: AI_TEAM/SPRINT_7_DIRECTIVE.md (or current sprint directive)
4. Read: AI_TEAM/00_STATUS.md (verify sprint number matches)
5. If mismatch: post to /gateway/agent/handoff with correction
6. Document incident in AI_TEAM/SYSTEM_SELF_HEAL_[date].md
7. Resume work

When BC session restarts:
1. Check AI_TEAM/ for highest CYCLE number — that is current state
2. Read the SPRINT_X_DIRECTIVE.md for current sprint
3. DO NOT trust numbered files (00-09) for sprint state — trust CYCLE files
4. Verify gateway is live before firing GBT cycles
5. Keep GBT prompts under 250 chars

---

## LESSONS LEARNED

1. **Two tracking systems created confusion.** Code has its own 00-09 numbered
   sprint files AND BC has CYCLE files. They diverged. Need ONE source of truth.
   Resolution: CYCLE files = authoritative. Numbered files = deprecated for sprint state.

2. **Inbox mechanism is unreliable.** Gateway handoff inbox path not confirmed
   end-to-end. Direct git commands are more reliable for Code orientation.
   Resolution: Always provide git pull + cat command as primary orientation method.

3. **GBT tools must be tested each session.** GBT silently falls back to web
   search when gateway tools fail. This is hard to detect unless you explicitly
   test 'Talked to [gateway]' appearing in GBT's response.
   Resolution: First message each session should be 'check gateway health'.
   If GBT doesn't show 'Talked to speculate-armband-retinal.ngrok-free.dev',
   alert Buck that gateway tools need reconfiguration.

4. **Short prompts to GBT are more reliable than long ones.**
   Mobile viewport truncates. Keep prompts focused.

5. **Mission Control is working and valuable.** Real live data (101 Francis RED,
   1355 Riverside RED) was detected correctly. The operational layer is solid.

---

*Self-heal complete. System status: YELLOW → recovering to GREEN.*
